textPlain: I found it more useful to read more books than read one book again and again. This helps me to reinforce the same concept from different angles. Our brain is a pattern matching machine, and it automatically picks up related concepts.
The corollary is to write to forget (or at least to get thoughts off your mind).
That's the idea behind "Getting Things Done" (GTD)
Writing seems to more of a tool to refine/coalesce thoughts
